name: Prologis, Inc.
summary: Prologis, Inc. is a self-administered REIT and global leader in logistics real estate, operating approximately 1.3 billion square feet across 20 countries on four continents. The company owns, manages, and develops high-quality logistics facilities and data centers, offers energy solutions including over 1 gigawatt of solar generation and storage capacity, and manages co-investment ventures with institutional investors through its Strategic Capital segment.

products.name: Rental Operations
products.description: Leasing of logistics and industrial real estate properties globally under operating leases with fixed or inflation-linked escalations.

products.name: Development Services
products.description: Build-to-suit, speculative, and redevelopment of logistics facilities and data centers in key markets.

products.name: Strategic Capital Management
products.description: Asset management, property management, leasing, acquisition, construction, and disposition services for co-investment ventures with institutional investors.

products.name: Prologis Essentials
products.description: Comprehensive platform delivering operational, energy, and sustainability solutions to customers, including solar generation and storage.

products.name: Data Center Development
products.description: Selective development of data centers leveraging power procurement, build-to-suit leasing, and construction capabilities.

partnerships.description: Publicly traded co-investment venture in Japan within the Strategic Capital segment.
Publicly traded co-investment venture in China within the Strategic Capital segment.
Publicly traded FIBRA co-investment venture in Mexico controlling Terrafina, within the Strategic Capital segment.
